description: Scales impact through communication, alignment, and driving change beyond one team.

signals: Impacts one module or subsystem with clear communication
examples: Improved a service module and posted a short write-up for the team
Answered questions about recent changes in standups

signals: Influences the whole team through ideas and solutions
Leads discussions on best practices within the team
examples: Ran a demo to align the team on a new testing approach
Documented lessons learned and presented them in a team review

signals: Engages other teams to share learnings and align decisions
examples: Presented a solution adopted by a neighboring team
Facilitated a design review with multiple teams for an integration

signals: Drives impact across multiple teams, scaling best practices
Establishes external networks that improve outcomes
examples: Led a compliance initiative across three teams and an external vendor
Shared reusable patterns that improved delivery speed across squads

signals: Impacts the broader organization through change and knowledge sharing
Champions initiatives that improve engineering culture
examples: Presented team achievements in an org-wide forum and secured buy-in
Authored guidance adopted across the org for onboarding

signals: Steers multi-team roadmaps and aligns stakeholders on strategy
Balances competing priorities to maximize customer value
examples: Aligned several teams on a platform upgrade timeline to unblock launches
Negotiated scope trade-offs with product and engineering leads

signals: Drives company-wide change and external reputation
Communicates complex strategy clearly to varied audiences
examples: Led an org-wide initiative improving flow and shared learnings externally
Influenced senior leadership decisions with clear technical narratives
